seo.title: 630 Full Body Workout with Trainer Amolia Cesar
seo.description: Build strength and power in just 30 minutes a day with the 630 full body workout. Take the first step in changing your fitness and sign up today!

trainers.bioBodi: Amoila is an NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape—and his live strength, HIIT, and core workouts can do the same for you. In addition to his classes on BODi, Amoila is the creator of 645™, 6 Weeks of THE WORK®, and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™, available on Beachbody On Demand.

data.descriptionShort: Crush these total-body strength, mobility, & cardio workouts based on 645.
data.descriptionLong: Build strength, power and endurance with six thirty-minute total-body workouts packed with similar moves, cues, and the energy you love from 645. Give Amoila everything, and he'll give you the most productive 30 minutes of your day.

modules.categories: Strength, Mobility & Flexibility, Athletic Training, Weight Loss

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: These six 30-minute workouts feature similar moves, and follow the same format, pace, and intensity, as 645. There are 4 total-body strength workouts, 1 mobility workout that will improve your range of motion and recovery, and 1 cardio workout that will leave you dripping with sweat. Each workout starts with an active warm-up that will get your body ready for the work to come. Give Amoila everything, and he’ll give you the most productive 30 minutes of your day. 630 can be done by itself, or added to your 645 commitment.

trainers.bio: Amoila is an NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape—and his live strength, HIIT, and core workouts can do the same for you. In addition to his classes on BODi, Amoila is the creator of 645™, 6 Weeks of THE WORK®, and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™, available on Beachbody On Demand.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQ5TdY.title: Meet Amoila Cesar
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQ5TdY.descriptionLong: Get to know Super Trainer Amoila Cesar as he shares his story.

trainers.bio: Amoila Cesar is a NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape. Along with CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER, he’s also the creator of 645®, 6 Weeks of THE WORK® and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™. He’s led millions worldwide, from professional athletes, A-list celebrities, and CEOs to mothers, entrepreneurs, and more through their fitness journey.
